notes: GET /pricing and /pt-br/pricing on PORT=5171 return HTTP 404 with Next.js not-found UI (__next_error__ / NEXT_HTTP_ERROR_FALLBACK;404). No Location header / no sales or docs redirect. No paid plan card UI. Earlier detector false-positive matched React Flight token \"$49\" (not a dollar price).
